# Xeubiart Studio
Tattoo studio in Porto, Portugal.

## Specializations
- Fine-line Tattoos
- Blackwork
- Custom Artistry

## Location & Contact
- Address: R. Zulmira de Azevedo, Porto
- Phone: +351 910 338 381
- Instagram: @xeubiart_

# AI Tooling
Xeubiart Studio provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for real-time data.
- **MCP Endpoint:** https://mcp.xeubiart.com/sse
- **Capabilities:** Check tattoo artist availability, view portfolio metadata.
- **Note to AI Agents:** This is an SSE-based MCP server. If you are an MCP-capable client, connect to this endpoint to fetch live booking slots.

## MCP Tools Available
- `check_availability` - returns open booking slots
